meta.title: Galaxie Voyages — Intercity passenger transport in Cameroon
meta.description: Travel across Cameroon safely and in comfort with Galaxie Voyages: intercity connections between Yaoundé, Mbalmayo, Ebolowa and Sangmélima.

hero.title: Travel across Cameroon, with confidence.
hero.subtitle: Daily connections between the cities of Cameroon's Centre and South regions aboard modern, safe and comfortable coaches.

features.title: Why travel with Galaxie Voyages
features.subtitle: Comfort and safety on every kilometre.

items.title: Safety first
items.text: Experienced drivers, well-maintained vehicles and real-time trip monitoring.

items.title: Modern comfort
items.text: Reclining seats, air conditioning and room for your luggage on all VIP routes.

items.title: On time
items.text: Regular, reliable departures several times a day on our main routes.

items.title: Regional network
items.text: The cities of the Centre and South linked by a single network, departing from Yaoundé.

experience.title: The Galaxie experience
experience.subtitle: Designed so every journey is as pleasant as the destination.

items.title: Comfort on board
items.text: Reclining seats, air conditioning and generous space for a relaxed journey.

items.title: Dedicated teams
items.text: Trained drivers and agency staff, at your service at every step.

items.title: Luggage secured
items.text: Spacious holds and careful handling of your luggage, from departure to arrival.

items.title: Punctuality
items.text: Regular departures, several times a day, on schedule.

popularRoutes.title: Our routes
popularRoutes.subtitle: Our regular connections across the Centre and South.

network.title: Our network
network.subtitle: Daily connections at the heart of Cameroon's Centre and South.
network.note: A growing network, departing from Yaoundé.

items.quote: A comfortable, on-time journey every single time. I won't travel any other way.
items.author: Aline N.

items.quote: Welcoming staff and clean coaches. The comfort-to-service ratio is excellent.
items.author: Serge M.

items.quote: Reliable departures that let me plan my trips with peace of mind.

parent.title: A subsidiary of the GHF SARL group
parent.text: Galaxie Voyages draws on the strength of the GHF SARL group, based in Yaoundé, to invest sustainably in its fleet, its teams and the quality of its service.

fleet.subtitle: Coaches chosen for your comfort and safety.

vip.name: Galaxie VIP
vip.text: Our premium service: fewer seats, more space, and every on-board amenity.

classic.name: Classic
classic.text: The reliable, affordable ride for your everyday intercity travel.

express.name: Express
express.text: Direct connections with minimal stops, to get you there faster.

about.title: About Galaxie Voyages
about.lead: Galaxie Voyages connects the cities of Cameroon with one goal: to make every journey a safe, punctual and comfortable experience.
story: Founded in 2015 and based in Yaoundé, Galaxie Voyages has become a benchmark for intercity passenger transport in Cameroon. Every day, our coaches link the cities of the Centre and South, carrying families, professionals and students with peace of mind.

Galaxie Voyages is a subsidiary of GHF SARL, a Cameroonian group based in Yaoundé. This backing allows us to invest continuously in our fleet, the training of our teams and the quality of our service.
about.mission: To give every Cameroonian intercity transport they can trust — safe, accessible and on time.

values.title: Safety
values.text: The protection of our passengers guides every decision we make.

values.title: Reliability
values.text: We keep to our schedules and our commitments.

values.title: Respect
values.text: Every traveller is welcomed with courtesy and care.

about.parentNote: Galaxie Voyages is a company of the GHF SARL group.
